heroDescription.processed: A wood-fired kitchen celebrating the seasons. Every dish begins with the finest local ingredients, kissed by flame and crafted with care. Join us for an unforgettable dining experience.
heroDescription.summary: A wood-fired kitchen celebrating the seasons. Every dish begins with the finest local ingredients, kissed by flame and crafted with care. Join us for an unforgettable dining experience.

ctaDescription.processed: Whether it is a romantic dinner for two, a family celebration, or a corporate gathering, we will make your evening exceptional. Book online or call us directly.
